prompts.title: Supercar
prompts.prompt: Use the uploaded reference photo. Do not change the Subject’s facial features. The Subject must look 1000% identical to the uploaded images. Behind the Subject, the showroom ceiling features bold, linear black slats running diagonally across the frame, creating strong depth as soft reflections from overhead fixtures glimmer faintly. To the right, a glossy black croc-embossed duffel bag sits on the speckled concrete floor—its structured handles, metal hardware, and textured surface illuminated by diffused light drifting from the car’s reflection. To the left, another red beanbag and subtle racing-themed decor add controlled pops of color without distracting from the Subject. The supercar behind the Subject gleams under directional lighting: its sculpted hood shifts from deep shadows to hot reflections along its curves, black rims nestle beneath aerodynamic fenders, and the polished windshield captures faint interior reflections. In the background, a mirrored wall reveals reversed silhouettes of showroom signage, racing helmet displays, and stylized circuit-track outlines along a matte dark wall. Fine, realistic micro-details—dust speckles on the concrete, tiny reflections dancing across the leather surfaces, faint fingerprints on the duffel bag’s glossy texture, and dramatic shadow falloff around the Subject’s shoes—create a fully HD, natural, and authentic look, as if photographed with an iPhone camera. prompts.title: Polaroid poses
prompts.prompt: Use the same girl as reference: keep her facial features consistent, preserve her natural hair color and hair length. Vertical 4:5 image of several overlapping instant-film photos (Polaroid style) scattered on a neutral light surface, ultra-photorealistic. Each instant frame shows the same girl styled for an evening look. Lighting inside the Polaroids: strong direct flash, front-on, slightly above the lens, giving that classic point-and-shoot party look. High contrast, bright specular highlights on shoulders and collarbones, subtle falloff to the corners with a light vignette. Background inside each shot is a plain light wall, evenly lit but with a slight shadow halo around her. White balance neutral-warm (around 5200K), skin glows, flash reflections on satin fabric clearly visible. Main scene lighting (the collage itself): soft diffused daylight from a side window, casting gentle, long shadows of the Polaroids on the surface. No harsh reflections on the glossy instant-film borders; soft, natural highlights along the white frames. Girl: hair voluminous at the roots, styled in glamorous soft waves. One side is often tucked behind the ear to reveal the earrings. The hair has a smooth, glossy finish; it looks free and natural yet neatly styled. In some playful shots, the ends flick outward slightly from movement. Outfit & fabrics: elegant strapless evening dress in a deep, dark tone. Bodice has a structured, corset-inspired shape with a sweetheart neckline, slightly plunging. Fabric is a mix of matte base and sheer or semi-sheer organza or tulle overlays that create soft, sculpted folds along the neckline and bust. The dress is fitted through the torso, emphasizing the waist. Texture: smooth satin or heavy silk underlayer with a soft sheen where the flash hits; airy, translucent tulle/organza ruffles at the top edge for volume and dimension. No visible logos. Accessories & styling: small to medium statement earrings in a metallic finish (simple hoops or geometric drops) catching points of light from the flash. Makeup is polished evening glam: even, luminous skin, contoured cheeks, highlighted cheekbones and collarbones, defined brows, soft smoky eyes, and plush lips with a satin or glossy finish. Polaroid poses (3–4 distinct shots): 1. Classic beauty portrait: she faces slightly three-quarters toward the camera, shoulders angled, chin elongated, gaze direct and confident. One arm relaxed, the top edge of the strapless dress cleanly visible. Expression calm, poised, very editorial. 2. Strong posture shot: shoulders back, one hand placed on hip, elbow bent to create a sharp line; torso subtly twisted to emphasize the neckline and waist. Head tilted a little, gaze to the side as if caught mid-turn. Long hair flows over one shoulder and down the back, some strands loose near the collarbone. 3. Playful kiss-face: mid-chest crop, body slightly leaned forward toward the lens, lips pursed in a pout or kiss, eyes wide or gently squinted. One shoulder lifted closer to the camera, giving a dynamic, flirty angle; hair swings outward at the ends, catching motion blur from the flash. 4. Optional extra: candid laugh or smirk, shoulders relaxed, head tipped slightly back, mouth open or in a half-smile, one arm partly visible as if mid-gesture, hair cascading to one side. Overall style/mood: chic party-afterglow collage, celebrity-photo-booth vibe. Instant-film aesthetic with white borders, warm on-camera flash, simple light wall background; glamorous strapless dress in satin with sheer tulle details, voluminous wavy hair, statement earrings, expressive but elegant posing.

prompts.title: Demonic Embrace
prompts.prompt: Hyper-realistic close-up dark fantasy beauty shot of a pale young woman with brown hair, captured from the side as she tilts her head back and exposes her neck and jawline in a vulnerable, almost trance-like pose against a soft, overexposed white background. A pair of demonic black hands enters the frame: one from above, reaching down with long, curved, glossy claws poised over her face, and another from below, wrapping around the front of her neck and collarbones like a cage, each finger elongated and tapered into razor-sharp talons. The hands are completely black from fingertips to wrist, with a subtle leathery skin texture, faint tendons and knuckle ridges visible beneath a matte surface, and high-gloss reflections along the claw edges, giving them an inhuman, shadow-creature feel. The woman’s skin shows delicate pores, tiny moles and faint freckles, with a translucent quality where light passes through the ear and along the rim of the jaw; her lips are slightly parted, expression serene and ambiguous, as if both threatened and embraced. The overall composition is minimal and ethereal—almost monochrome—with soft focus falloff in the background and hair, while the black claws and pale skin interaction is rendered in ultra-sharp detail, making it look like a high-fashion horror editorial still. Camera & Settings: Full-frame camera, 85mm lens, tight close-up portrait, ISO 100, f/1.8, 1/200s, 8K RAW. Lighting & Mood: High-key diffused light from the front and slightly above, wrapping gently around the face and neck, with very soft shadows; background blown to near-white; mood is dreamy yet ominous, like a ghostly angel haunted by a shadow demon. Skin Realism: visible skin pores, natural texture, fine imperfections; delicate subsurface scattering along ears, jaw and shoulders; subtle sheen of moisture on lips and under eyes. Hair & Fabric: hair rendered in individual strands with soft waves and flyaways, slightly blurred toward the ends; no distracting clothing, only a hint of a pale strap or bare shoulder to keep focus on skin and hands. Post-processing: Clean editorial retouch preserving all micro-texture, gentle HDR to keep detail in both bright skin and deep blacks of the hands, cool-neutral color grading with almost monochrome palette, mild bloom around brightest highlights, subtle film grain, and precise sharpening on the claws, eyelashes and fine skin detail for a polished cinematic finish.

prompts.title: White dragon
prompts.prompt: Use facial feature of attached photo. A surreal and intimate portrait of a young person embracing a mythical white-scaled dragon in a minimalist setting. The subject, with soft features and slightly damp blonde hair, closes their eyes in serene tenderness, resting against the dragon’s textured face. The dragon’s pale ivory scales glisten under soft light, with intricate ridges and spikes adding realism and depth. Its piercing eye looks outward, conveying wisdom and gentle strength, while its presence feels protective and ethereal. Both figures wear or embody tones of white-- the person in a crisp high-collared coat and the dragon in natural scales-- creating a monochromatic harmony that emphasizes purity, connection, and fantasy. The background is simple and bright, ensuring full focus on the emotional bond between human and creature. The atmosphere evokes themes of trust, guardianship, and dreamlike storytelling. Scale Ratio: Human and dragon fill ~90% of the frame, tightly framed for intimacy. Background is minimal, ~10%, providing clean negative space. Aspect ratio: 4:5 vertical portrait, emphasizing closeness and emotional impact. Camera Settings: Lens: 50mm prime (natural perspective, close-up intimacy). Aperture: f/2.2 (soft focus on background, sharp detail on faces and textures). ISO: 200 (balanced exposure in bright indoor lighting). Shutter speed: 1/160s (captures subtle stillness). Lighting: Soft natural or studio-diffused light, no harsh shadows, evenly illuminating skin and scales. Style: Emphasis on texture contrast: smooth skin vs. reptilian scales. Minimalist background to highlight subjects. Soft monochromatic palette of whites and neutrals. Mood: intimate, protective, dreamlike, otherworldly.
